  • Usage Guide
    • Assessment Modes
    • Command-Line Interface
      • Mode 1: Task-Agnostic (default)
      • Mode 2: Task-Specific Web Ontology
      • Mode 3: Task-Based Scientific
      • Mode 4: Cross-Domain
      • CLI Arguments
    • Python API
      • Mode 1: Task-Agnostic Assessment
      • Mode 2: Task-Specific Web Ontology Assessment
      • Mode 3: Task-Based Scientific Assessment
      • Mode 4: Cross-Domain Assessment

API Reference

  • API Reference
    • Assessment Runners
      • run_ontology_assessment()
      • run_web_ontology_assessment()
      • run_task_based_assessment()
    • Task-Based Metric
      • task_based_metric_v_0_0_1()
    • Labeling Metrics
      • ontocheck.check_label
        • mainLabelCheck_v_0_0_1()
      • ontocheck.altLabelCheck
        • mainAltLabelCheck_v_0_0_1()
      • ontocheck.defCheck
        • mainDefCheck_v_0_0_1()
    • Structural Metrics
      • ontocheck.check_for_isolated_elements
        • check_for_isolated_elements()
      • ontocheck.count_class_connected_components
        • count_class_connected_components()
      • ontocheck.get_properties_missing_domain_and_range
        • get_properties_missing_domain_and_range()
      • ontocheck.leafNodeCheck
        • mainLeafNodeCheck_v_0_0_1()
      • ontocheck.semanticConnection
        • mainSemanticConnection_v_0_0_1()
    • Accessibility Metrics
      • ontocheck.check_sparql_accessibility_ttl
        • check_sparql_accessibility_ttl()
      • ontocheck.check_rdf_dump_accessibility_ttl
        • check_rdf_dump_accessibility_ttl()
      • ontocheck.check_human_readable_license_ttl
        • check_human_readable_license_ttl()
      • ontocheck.check_external_data_provider_links_ttl
        • check_external_data_provider_links_ttl()
    • Naming Convention Metrics
      • ontocheck.check_class_name_capital
        • mainClassNameCapitalCheck_v_0_0_1()
      • ontocheck.check_class_name_space
        • mainClassNameSpaceCheck_v_0_0_1()
      • ontocheck.spell_check
      • ontocheck.find_duplicate_labels_from_graph
        • find_duplicate_labels_from_graph()
      • ontocheck.class_search
        • mainClassSearch_v_0_0_1()

        • main()

Previous

Helper Functions

Internal helper functions used by the assessment metrics. These are not part of the public API but are documented here for reference.

ontocheck.helpers.helpers

Helper functions extracted from the codebase.
